title: Spaghetti Carbonara
summary: A classic Italian pasta dish with eggs, cheese, bacon, and black pepper.
instructions: Cook spaghetti according to package instructions.
Whisk eggs and Parmesan together in a bowl.
Combine pasta with pancetta, remove from heat, stir in egg mixture.
Season with black pepper and serve.

title: Chicken Tikka Masala
summary: Chunks of grilled chicken cooked in a creamy tomato-based gravy.
instructions: Marinate chicken in yogurt and tikka masala paste for 1 hour.
Sauté onions, add tomato puree, and simmer.
Add cream and grilled chicken, simmer for 10 minutes.
Serve with rice or naan bread.
